description_long: This bird features a pale buff or sandy-colored body with a slightly darker, warm brown hue on its wings and back. Its wings are accented with black and dark blue patches, while the tail is long, slender, and tapers to a point, also showing dark coloration. The head is rounded with a subtle black line running from the beak over the eye, giving it a distinctive facial marking. The beak is straight, medium-length, and pointed, well-suited for probing or picking. The legs are thin and gray, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, typical of perching birds. The overall appearance is sleek and streamlined, with smooth, closely-set feathers and a subtle gradient between the lighter and darker areas.
description: A sleek, sandy-colored bird with dark wings, a pointed tail, and a distinctive black facial marking. Its beak is straight and pointed, and its legs are thin and gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's pale body, dark wings, and long, pointed tail, with the black facial marking visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical dark wing patches and the full length of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile and the same color pattern.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded head, straight beak, and both legs, with the facial marking running over the eyes.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pale body with dark wing patches and a black facial stripe
